name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify, processing 10–20 purchase orders/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient purchase order creation causes late orders. We streamline the process instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify, processing 10–20 purchase orders/month
problem_solved: Inefficient purchase order creation and approval process
